triples.subject: Electric Vehicle Outlook
triples.sentence: The Electric Vehicle Outlook is our annual long-term publication looking at how electrification, shared mobility, autonomous driving and other factors will impact road transport in the coming decades.

triples.subject: China
triples.sentence: China still dominates the global EV market, but sales are rising quickly elsewhere too.

triples.subject: EVs of all types
triples.object: 1.7 million barrels per day of oil usage
triples.sentence: EVs of all types are already displacing 1.7 million barrels per day of oil usage, equivalent to about 3% of total road fuel demand.

triples.subject: Net Zero scenario
triples.sentence: The report includes a “Net Zero” scenario which investigates what a potential route to carbon neutrality looks like across all segments of road transport by 2050.
